The Unified Business Architecture

Scale Your Enterprise.
Bila Worry.

Empowering Kenyan businesses with world-class automation, secure data tracking, and seamless financial operations.

Start Your Journey Explore Ecosystem
🛍️

Retail Transformation

Retail Pro

Designed for shops and modern retail environments. Manage inventory, track repeat customers, and log M-Pesa transactions instantly.

  • ✓
    Automated CRM

    Every sale creates a customer profile. No manual logging required.

  • ✓
    M-Pesa Integration

    Seamless mapping of payments to sales records for accurate accounting.

  • ✓
    Loyalty & Credit

    Track customer debts and reward your most loyal fans.

NGO & Field Operations

Impact Ops

The ultimate data engine for NGOs. Track beneficiaries, monitor impact metrics, and maintain a bulletproof audit trail for donors.

  • ✓
    Beneficiary CRM

    detailed history of interactions, subsidies, and impact for every person you serve.

  • ✓
    Field-Ready Offline Access

    Log data even in low-connectivity areas; sync when you're back online.

  • ✓
    Enterprise Auditing

    Transparency for stakeholders with immutable logs of all resource distributions.

🌍
🏨

Hospitality Excellence

Resort OS

A premium operating system for lodges and boutique hotels. Absolute control over guest folios, housekeeping lifecycles, and multi-property management.

  • ✓
    Automated Folios

    Guest billing simplified. Log charges for bar, kitchen, or stay in one click.

  • ✓
    Housekeeping Hub

    Real-time room status tracking from 'Dirty' to 'Inspected' & 'Clean'.

  • ✓
    Multi-Property View

    Switch between multiple hotels or campsites from a single dashboard.

Trusted by Leaders

"CampoPawa transformed our retail operations. Customer management is now 10x faster and we've seen a 40% increase in repeat business."

Zero Friction

How it Works

1

Create Account

Register in 30 seconds. Choose your business type and your environment is instantly provisioned.

2

Configure Workflow

Add your products, staff, or beneficiaries. Map your custom categories and permissions with zero code.

3

Go Live

Start logging business magic. Get real-time analytics and scale your enterprise with absolute clarity.

Core Signal Capabilities

The Ecosystem Advantage

🔒

Hardened Security

Enterprise-grade encryption protecting your commercial and beneficiary data with local compliance at its core.

  • ● 256-Bit Storage
  • ● Daily Secure Backups
  • ● Permission Engines
📡

Field-Ready PWA

Log data even in low-connectivity areas. Our "Core Signal" architecture ensures zero data loss during sync.

  • ● Offline Data Logging
  • ● Intelligent Syncing
  • ● App-Like Experience
📊

Live Analytics

Real-time pulse engine for your business velocity. Track KPIs, impact, or revenue as it happens.

  • ● Custom Dashboards
  • ● Instant Reporting
  • ● KPI Visualization

Empowering Kenya

Building the Infrastructure for Future Titans.

CampoPawa was built to solve a single problem: Kenyan businesses needed enterprise tools that understood the local hustle. Today, we power hundreds of vendors with a simple promise—absolute reliability and zero worry.

Knowledge Base

Common Questions

You can sign up and start using CampoPawa in under 5 minutes. Simply register, choose your portal, and start managing operations immediately.

Yes. We use 256-bit encryption and comply with the Kenya Data Protection Act. Your data is backed up daily to multiple secure nodes.
